full_quote:
I’ve had the privilege of working closely with Kyle at Rebind. He's been a key team member in helping us achieve our vision. 

Kyle is very adaptable. Startups like ours need people who can pivot very quickly to the business' changing direction or needs. Kyle quickly transitions between strategic and tactical work which has been key to our success. He's helped ground our ideas (good and bad!) in the customer's needs and practices--all while making it beautiful!

If you're looking for someone who brings not just design expertise but also a thoughtful, strategic, and collaborative mindset to the table, I can't recommend Kyle highly enough. He has been an absolute pleasure to work with, and his contributions have left a lasting mark on our product and our team.
